title: Eventrix
description: Eventrix is a MERN stack web application for renting event equipment, featuring full CRUD capabilities for inventory management.

title: Dynamic CV Generator
description: A highly optimized, custom theme that formats raw user data into professional resumes. Focus on SEO and minimal load times.

title: Automated Content Pipeline
description: An experimental workflow script using Generative AI to automatically generate video scripts, voiceovers, and background music for social media.

title: News Video Automation
description: A system for rapidly producing political news coverage videos for YouTube and Facebook, utilizing AI for script generation and metadata optimization.
